overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character in Western attire exploring a rural homestead. The character walks past a horse-drawn carriage and traverses a garden path with wooden pergolas during overcast weather.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural homestead front yard with horse-drawn carriage

events.description: character turns left and walks past the carriage, moving from front yard to side passage

agents.ego_description: walking past the stationary horse-drawn carriage and turning left to follow the path alongside the house

notable_agents.action: stationary horse-drawn carriage with driver seated on the bench
two horses (one dark brown, one white) harnessed to the carriage

entered.detail: raised wooden porch with steps and railings on the main house
weathered wooden picket fence lining the property boundary

segments.scene_description: The scene opens on a rural homestead with a horse-drawn carriage parked on a dirt path. The character walks past the two harnessed horses and turns left along the side of the wooden house, passing the porch and fence.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow passage between wooden buildings with grass and barrels

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow side yard between the main house and adjacent outbuildings

entered.detail: stacked wooden barrels and crates beside the house wall
small wooden outbuilding with sloped roof visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a narrow passage between wooden structures, with grass growing alongside the dirt path. Wooden barrels are stacked against the house wall, and a small shed appears in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: garden path with wooden trellis leading to covered pergola

events.description: character enters the covered pergola area with lattice roof structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the garden and entering the wooden pergola with lattice walls

entered.detail: white wooden garden archway with lattice design marking the entrance
covered walkway with wooden beam roof and lattice sides
wooden chairs and tables arranged on the pergola deck

segments.scene_description: The path opens into a garden area with a white wooden trellis archway. The character passes through the trellis and enters a covered pergola with outdoor furniture, transitioning from open garden to a sheltered patio space.

scene_state.functional_zone: open yard with small shed and cornfield

events.description: character exits the pergola into the open yard with agricultural buildings

agents.ego_description: exiting the pergola and walking through the open yard toward a small shed and cornfield

entered.detail: small white wooden shed with dark roof and shuttered windows
tall corn plants growing in rows behind a wooden fence

segments.scene_description: Leaving the pergola, the character enters a wide open yard with a small white shed ahead. To the left, a cornfield grows behind a wooden fence, while various outbuildings are scattered throughout the rural property.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rural homestead that transitions from a narrow residential path into an open garden and yard. It begins by passing a horse-drawn carriage on a dirt path, moving alongside a wooden house and its porch. As the camera proceeds, the space tightens into a narrow passage lined with grass and stacked wooden barrels before opening up into a garden area. The scene then shifts through a white wooden trellis archway and into a sheltered pergola with outdoor furniture, transitioning from the open air to a covered patio. Finally, the camera leaves the shelter to enter a wide open yard, passing a wooden fence bordering a cornfield and various scattered outbuildings.
